summary: Self-hosted web cockpit for supervising multiple CLI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode) across local + SSH nodes, styled after the OpenAI Codex desktop app but running on the web. Sessions persist via tmux; identity/history in Postgres; unified status model with live WebSocket fan-out + Web Push; three-layer per-session browser.

decisions.terminal_emulator: wterm primary / xterm.js fallback (decided by Phase-0 OSC spike)
decisions.mobile: PWA now + native-ready API (shared TS types; native app later needs only APNs/FCM push adapter)
decisions.v1_scope: Full PRD Phase 1 + read-only Diff pane; browser comments (FR-B5) and worktrees deferred to v1.x
decisions.node_transport: Local + SSH in parallel behind a shared NodeTransport interface
decisions.browser_location: Per-session Chrome containers always on the orchestrator VPS (nodes stay dumb)
decisions.hook_injection: Session-scoped config dirs + env (reversible, no clobber)
decisions.reconcile: Re-attach + ground-truth probe + resync event + coarse PTY-scrollback heuristic; missed transitions not replayed
decisions.spikes: Phase 0, gated before commit (wterm OSC; browser-harness 3-gate)
decisions.auth: First-run admin setup + invite; argon2id; httpOnly secure cookies; roles admin/member; TLS
decisions.secrets: App-level encryption at rest (libsodium/AES-GCM), ciphertext in Postgres, key_version rotation, pluggable for KMS/Vault
decisions.center_pane: Terminal-first; summary in right activity sidebar; tabs Terminal|Browser|Diff
decisions.design_fidelity: Codex-faithful skeleton + distinctive Flock polish via frontend-design skill. JSON-driven flock-theme token set mirroring codex-theme-v1 (surface/accent/ink/status/diff/fonts), light+dark first-class, OS-aware. Keybindings: Cmd+K palette, Cmd+J terminal, Ctrl+L clear. Full Codex UI reference captured in spec Appendix A.
decisions.testing: Layered pyramid: vitest unit, dockerized integration, Playwright e2e, per-agent hook contract tests
decisions.ci_gate: typecheck + lint + unit + integration + e2e + build

phases.name: Spikes
phases.verification: decisions recorded in docs/decisions/; no spike code in production paths

phases.name: Node transport, tmux, terminal
phases.verification: full gate incl. local+sshd integration + terminal Playwright smoke

phases.name: Status, hooks, notifications
phases.verification: full gate incl. hook contract tests + push + reconcile integration

phases.name: Three-layer per-session browser
phases.verification: full gate incl. container lifecycle + screencast integration

phases.name: Codex-style UI shell + design polish
phases.verification: full gate incl. Playwright e2e both themes + mobile viewport

phases.name: Deploy, audit, hardening, e2e
phases.verification: docker compose up smoke + full e2e (US-41/US-42) green in CI

definition_of_done: All US acceptance criteria pass; all 7 phases verified; full CI gate green; docker compose up yields a working cockpit per US-41/US-42
